g.text: You: Help me to understand the architecture of Transformer & How can I build LLM with it?
Building LLMs from Scratch: A Deep Dive
Below is a concise, step‑by‑step roadmap that pulls directly from the provided material on modern transformer design,
coupled with the most useful learning resources.
“Building Transformer Models From Scratch with PyTorch”
The lecture notes: formulas for sin/cos; implementation example
The philosophy section of the LLMs from Scratch lecture
Equations in the overview; code snippets in the PyTorch demo
